items.title: Anthropic will deploy 2 gigawatts of AMD GPUs for Claude in a deal worth up to $5 billion
items.summary: AMD is investing up to $5 billion in Anthropic. In return, Anthropic will deploy up to 2 gigawatts of MI450 GPUs for training and running its Claude models.
